message:
fix(missions): MissionBrowser close button on right, matching BaseModal (#6308) (#6314)

* fix(missions): MissionBrowser close button on right, matching BaseModal (#6308)

@xonas1101 reported that the Community Missions browser has its
close button on the LEFT of the top bar while every other modal in
the app has it on the RIGHT (confirmed by comparing to BaseModal
at web/src/lib/modals/BaseModal.tsx:198-212 which puts the X inside
the "Right side" div).

Users trained to close modals via the top-right X were not finding
it, and having a prominent button immediately to the left of the
search bar is easy to misclick when trying to focus the input.

Fix: move the close button to the right end of the top bar,
after the grid/list view-mode toggle. Same styling and behavior,
added an `aria-label` while editing the JSX. No functional change.

Closes #6308

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* test: bump raw hex ratchet 301→302 for #6308

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1170,14 +1170,6 @@ export function MissionBrowser({ isOpen, onClose, onImport, initialMission }: Mi {/* Top bar: search + filters */} {/* ================================================================== */}
- -
+ + {/* #6308: close button moved to the RIGHT end of the top bar to + match every other modal in the app (BaseModal etc). Having + it on the left was a confusing one-off — users trained to + close modals via the top-right X were not finding it. */} +
{/* Filter bar — constrained height on mobile with scroll */}
